chapter_title.en: Chapter 23 – Zakāt on the wealth of the orphans

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور بسنديه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/75)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور بسنديه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/75)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) هَلْ عَلَى مَالِ الْيَتِيمِ زَكَاةٌ قَالَ لَا إِلَّا أَنْ يُتَّجَرَ بِهِ أَوْ يُعْمَلَ بِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Hareyz, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,
‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘Is there Zakāt upon the wealth of the orphans?’ Heasws said: ‘No, unless if one were to trade with it, or work with it’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Hariz from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, if there is Zakat on orphan’s assets. He (the Imam) said, ‘No, Zakat is not due unless it is used in business or is made to work.’”
